allow: Bash(cd "c:\\new app" && mkdir server client supabase 2>&1 && echo "dirs created")

PowerShell(cd c:\\CropLink; $env:NODE_ENV="production"; $proc = Start-Process -PassThru -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run","start" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\cl_start.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\cl_start_err.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $out = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\cl_start.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $err = Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\cl_start_err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $running = -not $proc.HasExited; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Running=$running"; $out; $err)
